text: 神殿的最终区域。灯光在这里亮得刺眼。
column4: #texten:The final area of the temple. The lights here are blindingly bright.

column5: #texten:I made it... the very deepest point.

text: 中央有一个巨大的装置……
column5: #texten:There's a massive device in the center...

text: 好像在休眠。但我能感觉到，里面有什么东西。
column5: #texten:It seems dormant. But I can feel something inside it.
#texten:...My head hurts so much. The lights here are too strong.

text: 把最后的发现记录完吧。
column5: #texten:Let me finish recording the last discoveries.

text: 不管谁来到这里，都会需要这些笔记的。
column5: #texten:Whoever comes here next will need these notes.
